root_causes: MutationObserver feedback loop from unconditional category price/review text writes
MutationObserver feedback loop from unconditional verified-phone panel innerHTML rebuilds
Ad-detail seller phone and finance content rewritten on every observer pass
200ms ad-detail location polling loop lasting 15 seconds
Dashboard count rewritten with the same value
Theme DOM scans executed directly for each mutation instead of frame coalescing
Required label matcher left trailing whitespace after removing the asterisk
stability_changes: Guarded DOM writes by comparing current and next values
Structural signature for phone panel and content signatures for seller phone/finance
Coalesced async Post Ad runtime ticks
Route-scoped observer lifecycle with disconnect outside relevant routes
Removed all custom permanent setInterval polling loops
Bounded Supabase wait using the ready event
Content-hashed assets and synchronized ad route shells
production_test_limitations: No live Vercel deployment was performed
No real Text.lk OTP was sent
No production Supabase ad insert was performed
